name: Squash-Stuffed Crepes with Orange Glaze
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Butternut squash, cubed, steamed 20 minutes
1 cup Acorn squash, cubed, steamed 20 minutes
1 cup Spaghetti squash, peeled, cubed, steamed 20 minutes
1/2 cup Raisins, soaked in 1 1/2 cups warm water for 20 minutes, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cubed squashes, raisins, maple syrup, and chopped parsley in a medium mixing bowl. Toss well to combine.
2. In a small mixing bowl, whisk together toasted sesame oil and orange juice.
3. Place one crepe on a serving plate. Spoon 1/9 of the squash mixture onto the center of each crepe. Roll up tightly.
4. Brush the rolls with the sesame oil and orange juice glaze.
5. Sprinkle with chopped almonds.
6. Serve immediately, allowing the spaghetti squash strands to be gently scooped out if desired.
